en: on 140, what's your margin?
Our margin is about like $70.
So you spent 33 to get 70.
Yeah, I mean, that was before COVID. Now it's, I mean, it's- What's it now?
ko: 네, 그건 COVID 이전이었어요. 지금은, 지금은 얼마죠?

en: Well, I can't sell, I'm sold out.
ko: 음, 저는 팔 수 없어요, 다 팔렸어요.

en: When you sold everything in November, December
of last year, when did you actually ship it off? Four weeks ago.
It took forever to get them done.
Have you sold any sheets other than through crowdsourcing?
ko: 크라우드소싱 외에 다른 시트를 판매한 적이 있나요?

en: No, no, because I didn't have the inventory
and I was worried about making sure I can deliver
ko: 배송을 확실히 할 수 있을지 걱정했어요.

en: before I can start taking up more responsibilities.
And the shirts, did we touch on that yet? Not yet. Why don't you burn those? Why are you selling T-shirts?
ko: 그리고 셔츠는요, 그건 얘기했나요? 아직요. 그거 태워버리지 그래요? 왜 티셔츠를 팔고 있죠?

en: You can't make any money doing that. I might. What are your sales for the shirts?
ko: 그걸로 돈을 벌 수 없어요. 벌 수 있을지도 몰라요. 셔츠 판매량은 어때요?

en: So I just released the shirts co-pairing, which is underwear.
ko: 그래서 저는 속옷과 함께하는 셔츠를 방금 출시했어요.

en: And so this year we've made $270,000.
And how did you sell those? On our website.
Your ask is 212,000 for 10%, correct? Yes.
Why wasn't it 200 or 225? 212.
Do I know the real answer to that question? Yeah.
ko: 그 질문에 대한 진짜 답을 알고 있나요? 네.
